## What this PR does

_Briefly describe the change and link to the use-case it serves._

## Use-case affected

- **Slug:** _e.g. `gcf-preparation-facility`_ (or `n/a` for repo-wide changes)
- **Lifecycle stage:** _e.g. `brief`, `active-development`, `piloting`_

## Type of change

- [ ] New use-case (added a new folder)
- [ ] Brief update (existing `BRIEF.md` modified)
- [ ] Dataset added or hub-status changed
- [ ] Lifecycle status changed (incl. Go / No-Go decision recorded)
- [ ] Repo infrastructure (templates, workflows, Astro, deps)
- [ ] Documentation (README, GUIDELINES, CLAUDE.md)

## Checklist

- [ ] Frontmatter validates (`npm run check`)
- [ ] Build passes locally (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Status, owners, and dates updated if changed
- [ ] Background materials linked or marked `_TBC_`
- [ ] If status changed past the Go / No-Go gate, the `go_no_go:` block is filled in
- [ ] Master list in `README.md` updated if needed

## Notes

_Anything reviewers should know — open questions, follow-ups, blockers._
